name: Marvelous Mostacciol
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat.
2. Add onion and cook until tender.
3. Drain.
4. In a saucepan, combine tomatoes, tomato paste, water, oregano, and pepper.
5. Mix cottage cheese with marjoram.
6. Layer half of the noodles, meat sauce, and mozzarella in a 12x8 inches baking dish.
7. Spread with cottage cheese mixture.
8. Repeat layers of noodles, meat sauce, and mozzarella.
9. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
11. To make ahead: Follow steps 1-6. Cover and refrigerate overnight or freeze.
12. When ready to bake, uncover and bake at 350°F for 50 minutes.
